headline: Ameren Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Ameren (NYSE:AEE) reported first-quarter 2026 earnings of $1.28 per share, up from $1.07 per share in the first quarter of 2025, as increased infrastructure investment across operating segments drove results, company executives said on the utility’s earnings call.
